introSection: Galaxy Express 999 was a steel indoor enclosed roller coaster at Aqua Park in Takanawa, Minato, Tokyo, Japan. It opened in 2005 and closed on 31 October 2014.
fullText: Galaxy Express 999 was a steel indoor enclosed roller coaster at Aqua Park in Takanawa, Minato, Tokyo, Japan. It opened in 2005 and closed on 31 October 2014.
